title: The Trashed Hideout
content: You find Sterling's spot behind a wall of empty shipping crates. It's been hit—hard. An unmade cot is overturned, and a half-full cup of coffee is now cold and covered in a film of dust.||Someone was here recently. The Syndicate didn't just search the place; they tore it apart. But Sterling was a senior analyst—he knew how to hide things from people who only know how to break things.||You start looking for a professional's hiding spot.
